Name: Automate Manual Intervention Response
Description: This template will search for deployments that have been paused due to Manual Intervention or Guided Failure and automate the response.

Parameters.Name: AutomateResponse.Octopus.Url
Parameters.Label: Octopus Server Url
Parameters.HelpText: The Url to your Octopus Server instance.

Parameters.Name: AutomateResponse.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: API Key
Parameters.HelpText: API Key of the account you want to use for the automatic response.

Parameters.Name: AutomateResponse.Reason.Notes
Parameters.Label: Reason Notes
Parameters.HelpText: This is the `Notes` input for manual intervention.

Parameters.Name: AutomateResponse.ManualIntervention
Parameters.Label: Manual Intervention Response Type
Parameters.HelpText: Select the response type for the Manual Intervention.  Click Default Value to reset to none

Parameters.Name: AutomateResponse.GuidedFailure
Parameters.Label: Guided Failure Response Type
Parameters.HelpText: Select the automated response for a Guided Failure.  Click Default Value to reset to none.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
Fail|Fail
Exclude|Exclude Machine From Deployment
Ignore|Ignore
Retry|Retry
